description: This file contains SCSS mixins related to form validation styling, including state selectors, feedback, tooltips, and input styling for valid and invalid states.

methods.name: form-validation-state-selector
methods.description: A mixin that applies styles based on the validation state ($state), handling valid and invalid states with appropriate selectors.

methods.name: form-validation-state
methods.description: A mixin that styles feedback messages, tooltips, and form controls based on validation state, including colors, icons, and focus styles.
